scripts.build: cd web/app/themes/omakeikka-theme && npm run build:css && cd -
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose build --no-cache && npm run docker:up
scripts.docker:ssh: docker compose exec -u root php bash
scripts.docker:ssh:nginx: docker compose exec -u root nginx sh
scripts.wp:db:export: mkdir -p backups && docker compose run --rm wpcli --allow-root db export - > backups/$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M%S).sql && echo "Exported to backups/"
